---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for QRMessenger
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
<!-- Clear description of the feature you'd like -->

## Problem
<!-- Why is this needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How should it work? -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Any alternative approaches? -->

## Examples
<!-- Examples of similar features in other apps -->

## Implementation
<!-- Do you have thoughts on how to implement this? -->

## Impact
- [ ] Would improve user experience
- [ ] Would improve security
- [ ] Would improve performance
- [ ] Would add new capability
- [ ] Would fix a limitation

## Priority
- [ ] Critical (app is broken without this)
- [ ] High (very important)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (can wait)

## Additional Context
<!-- Any additional information -->

---

**Note**: Use GitHub Discussions for general ideas. Open an Issue once there's community support.
